ext_description.message: Let your call partner click, scroll, and type in a tab you select and approve, during a Ripple call.

popup_tagline.message: Remote control for one approved tab

popup_choose_tab.message: Pick the tab your call partner will click, scroll, and type in.

popup_include_subdomains_label.message: Also allow subdomains of this site

popup_reason_selected_tab_closed.message: Selected tab is no longer available.

popup_reason_selected_tab_incompatible.message: Selected tab is on a page Ripple can't control.

popup_reason_permission_lost.message: This tab moved to a different site: $SITE$. Grant access again to continue.

reason_tab_no_controllable_url.message: This tab has no controllable URL.

reason_tab_chrome_internal.message: Chrome internal pages cannot be controlled.

reason_tab_file_unsupported.message: Local files are not supported in V1.

reason_selected_tab_not_controllable.message: selected tab URL is not controllable

reason_keyboard_contenteditable_out_of_s.message: contenteditable is out of scope in V1
